testcase.name: test_register_three_users
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ssc_iteration2.py:83: in test_register_three_users token, user = _register(u) ^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_ssc_iteration2.py:52: in _register assert r.status_code == 200, f"register failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: register failed: 400 {"detail":"Captcha verification failed"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_2fa_setup_and_verify_and_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ssc_iteration2.py:105: in test_2fa_setup_and_verify_and_login token = state["u1_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'u1_token'

testcase.name: test_2fa_login_without_code_returns_401_with_header

failure.message: AssertionError: {'detail': 'Invalid credentials'} assert ('2fa' in 'invalid credentials' or 'code' in 'invalid credentials')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ssc_iteration2.py:139: in test_2fa_login_without_code_returns_401_with_header assert "2fa" in detail or "code" in detail, body E AssertionError: {'detail': 'Invalid credentials'} E assert ('2fa' in 'invalid credentials' or 'code' in 'invalid credentials')

testcase.name: test_2fa_login_with_correct_code_succeeds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ssc_iteration2.py:155: in test_2fa_login_with_correct_code_succeeds code = pyotp.TOTP(state["u1_totp_secret"]).now() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'u1_totp_secret'
